allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from langchain_tavily import TavilySearch; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsourcefile\(TavilySearch\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import os; os.environ['TAVILY_API_KEY']='x'; from langchain_tavily import TavilySearch; t=TavilySearch\(\); r=t.invoke\('hi'\); print\(type\(r\), list\(r.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(r,dict\) else r\)")
